name: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection')
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')
Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
Improper Neutralization of Argument Delimiters in a Command ('Argument Injection')
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an LDAP Query ('LDAP Injection')
Improper Control of Resource Identifiers ('Resource Injection')
Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer
Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow')
Improper Handling of Length Parameter Inconsistency
Use of Hard-coded Password
evidence: application.properties:12 - spring.datasource.password=photoalbum; application-docker.properties:4 - spring.datasource.password=photoalbum. Hardcoded database password as literal string.

name: Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
evidence: HomeController.java:55-98 (upload endpoint) and PhotoServiceImpl.java:83-89: File type validation relies on Content-Type header which can be spoofed. No magic number/file signature validation. Files are stored as BLOB but MIME type check is not bulletproof.

name: Missing Initialization of a Variable
evidence: PhotoServiceImpl.java:113-115 - Integer width=null; Integer height=null initialized but conditionally assigned. If IOException occurs, width/height remain null and are passed to setWidth()/setHeight() at lines 148-149.

name: Use of Uninitialized Variable
evidence: PhotoServiceImpl.java:83 - file.getContentType().toLowerCase() - getContentType() can return null, no null check before calling toLowerCase(). Potential NullPointerException.

name: Use of Singleton Pattern Without Synchronization in a Multithreaded Context
Unsynchronized Access to Shared Data in a Multithreaded Context
Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
Improper Neutralization of Data within XPath Expressions ('XPath Injection')
Improper Neutralization of Data within XQuery Expressions ('XQuery Injection')
Operation on a Resource after Expiration or Release
Incorrect Calculation
evidence: MathUtil.java:17 - Potential division by zero in GCD function: if gcd(x, 0) is called directly, modulo by zero occurs. The while condition 'while (b != 0)' only protects against recursive iterations, not the initial call if b=0.

name: Incorrect Permission Assignment for Critical Resource
Missing Release of Resource after Effective Lifetime
Missing Release of File Descriptor or Handle after Effective Lifetime
Access of Memory Location Before Start of Buffer
Access of Memory Location After End of Buffer
Memory Allocation with Excessive Size Value
evidence: PhotoServiceImpl.java:119 - file.getBytes() allocates memory without re-validation at point of use. Size check at line 92 is an earlier guard but configuration misconfiguration could allow excessive memory allocation.

name: Use of Hard-coded Credentials
evidence: application.properties:11-12 - spring.datasource.username=photoalbum / spring.datasource.password=photoalbum; application-docker.properties:3-4 - spring.datasource.username=photoalbum / spring.datasource.password=photoalbum. Hard-coded database username and password combination.

name: Buffer Access with Incorrect Length Value
Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')
Data Access Operations Outside of Expected Data Manager Component
